articles.title: Breaking News of Technology: What's Trending in the Digital ...
articles.snippet: Keeping up with the fast pace of technology can feel like a full-time job. Every day brings new developments that change how we live, work, and connect. This article looks at some of the most interesting news of technology happening right now, from big AI shifts to the latest gadgets and how companies are handling the digital world.

articles.title: Unraveling the AI Dependency Trap: Key Software ...
articles.snippet: As of March 23, 2026, the software development landscape is buzzing with innovations, risks, and regulatory shifts that could reshape how businesses build and deploy technology. From the perils of over-relying on external AI tools to groundbreaking no-code platforms and high-profile corporate dramas.

articles.title: Advanced Technology | Roland Berger
articles.snippet: Technology advancements are affecting our daily lives, particularly in the field of healthcare. Robotic-assisted surgery is a prime example, bringing a revolution to the operating theatre. Another groundbreaking development in healthcare is the introduction of gene therapies.

articles.title: AI (artificial intelligence) - The Guardian
articles.snippet: Recent developments include Hachette pulling a horror novel over suspected AI use, Meta AI agent causing sensitive data leak, Essex police pausing facial recognition due to racial bias, and various AI-related controversies and investigations.

articles.title: TERAFAB: the next step to becoming a galactic civilization
articles.snippet: Elon Musk's massive chip factory called 'Terafab' could change everything. Instead of relying on companies like Nvidia or TSMC, Tesla is building its own semiconductor manufacturing capabilities.
